# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.IidSpikeDetector

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

IScanTransform for IID spike detection. No model — the input value IS the raw anomaly score. Applies KDE p-value and optional martingale scoring.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class IidSpikeDetector : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IScanTransform<HPD.ML.TimeSeries.IidAnomalyState>, HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```

